summary: Iteration 20: Tested REPORT role permissions and first contact logic. All features working correctly - REPORT user sees only allowed menu items (7 items), is blocked from restricted pages/APIs, rapportini are read-only, dashboard doesn't show 'Nuovo Evento'. First contact logic correctly saves dataPrimoContatto as today's date when creating future appointments.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users, created and cleaned up test clients during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: REPORT role permissions fully tested and working. First contact logic verified - dataPrimoContatto is set to today's date when creating future appointments. All menu restrictions, API blocks, and read-only modes working correctly.

report_role_menu_items.details: REPORT user sees exactly 7 menu items: Dashboard, Calendario, Rapportini Interni, Report Operativo, Report Eventi, Stampe, Audit Log

report_role_blocked_pages.details: REPORT user is redirected to /dashboard when accessing /clienti, /eventi, /appuntamenti, /menu-base, /impostazioni, /utenti

report_role_blocked_apis.details: REPORT user gets 403 on POST/PUT/DELETE for /api/clienti, /api/eventi, /api/appuntamenti, /api/presenze-villa, /api/users

report_dashboard_no_nuovo_evento.details: Dashboard for REPORT user doesn't show 'Nuovo Evento' button, shows 'Rapportini' and 'Stampe' quick actions instead

report_rapportini_readonly.details: Rapportini page for REPORT user shows only the list (read-only), no form for adding new presenze, PDF export available

report_calendario_no_nuovo_evento.details: Calendario page for REPORT user doesn't show 'Nuovo Evento' button

first_contact_date_logic.details: When creating future appointment with new client, dataPrimoContatto is set to today's date, not the appointment date

first_contact_in_calendar.details: First contacts appear in calendar with brown color and 📋 prefix, tooltip shows 'Registrazione 1° contatto'

first_contact_interazione.details: primo_contatto interazione is created when new client is added via appointment

report_operativo_intact.details: /api/report/stats returns valid data with summary, sources, operators, activities, meta

report_eventi_intact.details: /api/eventi returns list of events for Report Eventi page
